name: Oatmeal Cookies W/Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
2. In a bowl, beat the egg, water, margarine, shortening, and brown sugar until well combined.
3. Add cinnamon to the mixture and stir until incorporated.
4. Gradually mix in half of the cake mix into the batter.
5. Stir in the remaining cake mix, oatmeal, raisins (if using), and chopped nuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
